title: Master data privacy laws with BR's 1-month course: Limited seats, register now!
description: With the rollout of the DPDP Act, 2023 and DPDP Rules, 2025, organisations ranging from multinational tech giants to government bodies now require lawyers who can implement data protection laws and not merely interpret them. Bettering Results (BR) has launched the 4th batch of 1-Month Online Certificate Course on Data Privacy & Protection Laws, starting May 2, 2026.                With weekend-only
